description: You are preparing a session template for a live jazz recording in the 'MyProject' Ardour session. Create four audio tracks named 'Upright Bass', 'Piano', 'Drums', and 'Saxophone'. Set the session tempo to 140 BPM. Adjust the fader gain for 'Upright Bass' to -3 dB and 'Drums' to -6 dB, leaving the other tracks at 0 dB. Place at least three chronological location markers on the timeline named 'Set Start', 'Intermission', and 'Set End'. Mute the 'Saxophone' track. Save a session snapshot named 'Pre_Show_Template' without importing any audio.
